CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
